message:
feat: add pi_debug binary for tracing startup sequence

New debug wrapper binary (src/bin/pi_debug.rs) that traces each step of
the pi run() sequence with detailed logging. Useful for diagnosing
startup failures, auth issues, provider resolution, and session loading
without needing to add temporary debug prints to the main binary.

Uses anyhow for error handling and imports from pi's public API surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
